title: Liquid biopsy in sentinel mussels
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"beca4","text":"This protocol has been optimized for sampling hemolymph in sentinel mussels in remote areas, such as polar regions. A detailed protocol can be found in Caza et al. (2019).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":157,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":152,"length":18}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"C1039F2BA92611ECB5830A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0223525"}}}}

Sampling Section","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c6q2o","text":"1) Syringe (from 3 to 5 cc)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6fe3r","text":"2) 25 gauge needle","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c0boi","text":"3) Sterile 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8ld77","text":"4) Multi Spin Battery-Powered Mini-Centrifuge (3000 x g) or equivalent.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":54,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"di2r0","text":"5) Whatman 903™FTA cards","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":14,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"epb9t","text":"6) Plastic ziplock bags","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a7fsp","text":"7) Silica gel desiccants (1gr/bag)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"agvml","text":"8) Pipette P200","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fatk8","text":"9) Sterilized filter tips","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dsc2p","text":"10) Knife ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ekl4e","text":"11) Ethanol 70%","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e32vm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eq9dr","text":"B. Extraction of circulating cell-free DNA Section","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":50}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"co3i8","text":"1) QIAamp DNA Investigator Kit (Qiagen - Cat #56504)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"87meu","text":"2) Ethanol 100% ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6d0aq","text":"3) Sterile 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"av629","text":"4) Pipettes (P1000, P100, P20, P2)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"73gs3","text":"5) Sterilized filter tips","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Collect mussels ( Mytilus spp. ) with a shell length range between 50 to 70 mm.
Remove intervalvar liquid by opening gently the valves with the tip of a knife.
Transfer immediately the hemolymph to a sterile 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube (Optional: You can pool 3 or 4 hemolymph samples to obtain a total volume of 1.5 mL per tube).
Centrifuge for 3 minutes at maximum speed (approx. 3000 x g ) at room temperature using a battery-powered mini-centrifuge (TOMY, Japan) or equivalent.

After centrifugation, transfer the supernatant (clear solution above pellet at bottom of tube) in a new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube and gently resuspend the pellet. The pellets can be frozen (-20°C) or spotted on FTA cards until used use. Supernatants can also be frozen (-20°C) or spotted on FTA cards (using 70 µL aliquots) until use. We routinely use Whatman 903 ™ FTA cards with 13 mm discs to spot pellets or supernatants. Note : Once spotted, FTA cards are dried for 15 minutes at room temperature and stored individually in small ziplock plastic bags containing one silica gel desiccant moisture absorber. Note : Unless otherwise indicated, hemolymph should be collected and processed within one hour after sampling.
Unless otherwise indicated, you can use the QIAamp DNA Investigator Kit (Qiagen) for extraction of the hemolymphatic circulating cell-free DNA.
First, thaw frozen supernatants at room temperature and clarify by centrifugation for 10 minutes at 4500 x g at room temperature.
Transfer 70 μL of the clarified supernatant into a new sterile 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube.
Add 100 μL of buffer AL and 1 µL of reconstituted RNA Carrier (1µg/µL). Mix by pulse-vortexing for 15 seconds or until it is a homogeneous solution.
Add 30 µL of buffer ATL and 10 μL of proteinase K (>600 mAU/mL) to the sample.
Incubate at 56°C for 10 minutes on a lab orbital shaker set at 900 rpm.
Add 50 μL of ethanol (100%) and mix thoroughly by pulse-vortexing for 15 seconds. Then, incubate for 3 minutes at room temperature.
Transfer the entire lysate from step #14 to the QIAamp MinElute column.
Centrifuge at 6000 x g for 1 minute. Place the QIAamp MinElute column in a clean 2 mL collection tube and discard the collection tube containing the flow-through.
Add 500 μL of buffer AW1 to the QIAamp MinElute column.
Repeat Step #16.
Add 700 μL of buffer AW2 to the QIAamp MinElute column.
Repeat Step #16.
Add 700 μL of ethanol (100%) to the QIAamp MinElute column.
Repeat Step #16.
Centrifuge at full speed (20,000 x g ) for 3 minutes at room temperature.
Place the QIAamp MinElute column in a clean 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube and discard the collection tube containing the flow-through.
Open the lid and incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes.
Apply 60 μL of buffer ATE to the center of the membrane.
Close the lid and incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes.
Centrifuge at full speed (20,000 x g ) for 1 minute.
Discard the QIAamp MinElute column and keep the eluate.
Withdraw hemolymph from the adductor muscle using a syringe fitted with a 25G needle.
Bring the mussels back to their respective mussel bed.
creator: Sophia Ferchiou
